title: TermMax Bug Bounty

audit.reason: The report provides a clear and structured overview of the vulnerabilities identified in the TermMax smart contracts. It includes detailed descriptions, proof-of-concept code, and actionable recommendations for each vulnerability. The report is well-organized and easy to follow.
audit.improvements: The report could benefit from including more detailed technical analysis and potential impact assessments for each vulnerability. Additionally, providing specific lines of code where the vulnerabilities exist would enhance the clarity and usefulness of the report.
